name: kicad-autorouter
description: Pure Python autorouter for KiCad. Maze-based routing with multi-pass ripup-and-reroute optimization, derived from the Freerouting Java autorouter.
description_full:
A Python port of the Freerouting autorouter, built as a native KiCad Action Plugin. No Java required.

Features:
- Maze-based A* pathfinding through expansion rooms
- Multi-pass ripup-and-reroute for optimization
- 45-degree routing support
- Post-route trace pull-tight optimization
- Via reduction optimization
- Respects KiCad design rules and net classes
- Progress dialog with cancel support

Derived from Freerouting (https://github.com/freerouting/freerouting), forked as of 2026-03-30.

Usage: After installing, click the Autorouter button in the PCB Editor toolbar, configure settings, and click Route.
